name: CymorSpeed
description: A clean, fast internet speed test tool — download, upload and ping, no clutter, no ads, built to load instantly even on a slow connection.

name: Cymor VCF
shortDescription: Create, join and manage VCF contact sessions.
description: A contact-collection platform for events and communities — create a session, share the link, and collect everyone's contact card into one downloadable VCF file.

name: Cymor Love Hub
shortDescription: Cinematic love letters for the people you love.
description: An AI-powered romantic letter generator — describe your story, and receive a cinematic, typewriter-reveal letter experience to share with your beloved one.

name: CymorFootballLive
shortDescription: Watch live football matches from around the world.
description: A live football streaming hub with HLS playback, a mobile-responsive layout, and coverage across major leagues worldwide.

name: CymorAi
shortDescription: Interact with our AI for assistance.
description: A multi-model AI assistant — chat, vision, image generation and web search, powered by a blend of Groq, Gemini and HuggingFace models.

name: Cymor Tune
shortDescription: Listen to and download mp3 songs.
description: A glassmorphic music streaming PWA — search, stream and download tracks, with offline caching for uninterrupted listening.

name: Rumion Novel Hub
shortDescription: Read and write your own novels.
description: A full-stack novel reading and publishing platform — an author dashboard, a chapter reader, and a full ratings & comments interaction system.

name: Cymor Script Writer
shortDescription: Write professional screenplays and export as PDF.
description: An offline-first screenplay editor with true industry formatting — scene, character and dialogue autocomplete, automatic (CONT'D), and clean PDF export.

name: Cymor Code Learner
description: A 31-lesson HTML/CSS/JS curriculum built for absolute beginners — deep explanations, checkpoint gating, and progress that syncs across devices.

name: Cymor Bible App
shortDescription: Read the Word, interact with trivia and more.
description: A Bible reading companion with an interactive trivia mode — read scripture, test your knowledge, and grow in faith one verse at a time.

name: Cymor TikTok Downloader
shortDescription: Download TikTok videos without the watermark, or just the audio.
description: Paste any TikTok link to get a clean, watermark-free MP4, or extract the audio as a standalone MP3 — processed server-side, no ads or redirects.
